name: Endure Network
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN30 using the official Endure website and documentation. Common API/OpenAPI paths on the marketing domain currently return 404, and no verified source repository, public API, OpenAPI, SSE, or data artifact surface is promoted yet.

gap_notes: Official website and documentation are live and verified.
Common /docs, /api, /health, /openapi.json, and Swagger paths on endure.network currently return 404 and are explicitly excluded from promoted surfaces.
Generic email-protection pages are not listed as subnet interfaces.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: Endure documentation
surfaces.notes: Official Endure documentation linked from the project website.

surfaces.name: Endure Network TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/30 on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN30 Endure Network on-chain subnet state, hyperparameters, economics, and dTAO market fields. Endure publishes a website and documentation but no verified first-party public API endpoint; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API.
